actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d6 + 7) slashing damage.

actions.name: Tail
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Frightful Presence
actions.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

special_abilities.name: Multiattack
special_abilities.description: The dragon can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.description: The dragon can breathe air and water.

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance
special_abilities.description: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
